meaning: n.(一种猎兔用)小猎犬,<美俚>打听某事始末
examples: It presented a picture of a beagle.
The beagle studied the waters in the sea near South America.
There on the book's cover was a beagle which looked identical to my dog.
He chose Eric the Legal Beagle, clever enough to misinterpret anything to the way Barry wanted.
They returned home on the HMS Beagle, along with a traveler named Charles Darwin.
